side_effects.description: Mast cell reaction when dose was increased; also had reaction when restarting after a break, described as scary

protocol_notes: Completed an 8-week cycle with no problems. Started again after a few months and had the mast cell attack a few weeks in. Now takes Benadryl every night before any peptides. Originally dosed at 500 mcg then bumped to 1mg daily. Taking a break from GHRPs.
